title: Domain Evidence, Regulation, Standards, and Licensing Boundaries · Stakeholder Case: Authority Hierarchy
summary: The product depends on health, finance, education, civic, creative, or safety assumptions inferred from secondary summaries and incompatible licenses. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone authority hierarchy increment in domain authority and compliance boundary dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority.
Route domain, legal, accessibility, safety, privacy, or community questions to qualified review and preserve explicit non-claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Authority Hierarchy · Theory Authority Hierarchy
steps.instruction:
theory case — Secondary summaries, a draft framework, incompatible content licenses, and a broad compliance claim are treated as equal governing authority. The theory variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Authority Hierarchy contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Authority Hierarchy · Theory Authority Hierarchy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority. For Predict Authority Hierarchy · Theory Authority Hierarchy, keep Authority Hierarchy connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Secondary summaries, a draft framework, incompatible content licenses, and a broad compliance claim are treated as equal governing authority. The theory variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Authority Hierarchy condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: SLSA specification — Controls source and build tracks, provenance, artifact identity, verification, and honest supply-chain claims.

hints: For Predict Authority Hierarchy · Theory Authority Hierarchy, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Authority Hierarchy precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Authority Hierarchy · Theory Authority Hierarchy, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Secondary summaries, a draft framework, incompatible content licenses, and a broad compliance claim are treated as equal governing authority. The theory variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority.

For Predict Authority Hierarchy · Theory Authority Hierarchy, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: All official-looking web pages impose equivalent requirements.

options.text: All official-looking web pages impose equivalent requirements. That claim does not survive the predict authority hierarchy evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority. content.text: Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Secondary summaries, a draft framework, incompatible content licenses, and a broad compliance claim are treated as equal governing authority. The worked example variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority. A defensible solution applies Authority Hierarchy, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to domain authority and compliance boundary dossier.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-3
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: All official-looking web pages impose equivalent requirements. This fails the Authority Hierarchy contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence

steps.title: Defend the Authority Hierarchy model · Theory Authority Hierarchy
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Authority Hierarchy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Secondary summaries, a draft framework, incompatible content licenses, and a broad compliance claim are treated as equal governing authority. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Distinguish law, regulation, standard, specification, official guidance, contract, policy, research, convention, and opinion by jurisdiction and authority.
